title: Arcytophyllum cachirense
taxonomy: Arcytophyllum cachirense belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It is a species of flowering plant in the genus Arcytophyllum. The plant is native to Venezuela. The classification of Arcytophyllum cachirense places it as a member of the order Gentianales. Further classification indicates that it is a part of the clade Asterids.
